title: Semijoin returns duplicate values from a column with unique values
poc: create table dict as \r\n select value from generate_series(cast(1 as int), cast(2050 as int)) \r\n with data;
select value from generate_series(cast(1 as int), cast(2050 as int)) \r\n with data;
key_bug_features: Semijoin returns duplicates from unique column values
bug_features_seed: INSERT INTO dict SELECT value FROM generate_series(cast(1 as int), cast(2050 as int)) WITH DATA;
INSERT INTO t (i) SELECT value FROM dict WHERE value % 2 = 0;
SELECT d.value FROM dict d JOIN t ON d.value = t.i;
